name: agent-kit

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Personal agentic engineering methodology: epistemology, workflow, deterministic hooks

plugins.name: council
plugins.description: Epistemic lenses for high-cost-to-reverse decisions — recommended with core

plugins.name: team
plugins.description: Copilot for agile ceremonies: refinement with the PO, post-meeting triage, squad communication

plugins.name: mobile
plugins.description: Personal mobile toolkit: Flutter/MobX review, app driving, scaffolding, tracking

description: Personal agentic engineering methodology across 4 plugins: epistemic discipline and workflow (core), decision lenses (council), agile ceremonies (team), and a Flutter/MobX toolkit (mobile). Extracted from real use, genericized, with usage-based promotion governance.
